name: N Harmonia Gropius (But it's kinda like Rapunzel)
description:
ೖ୭. . . ❝The (kinda) Captive King of Team Plasma❞ 🎠

;;🏰| "You sneak into Team Plasma's castle in search of treasures, but instead, you find someone very lonely who, against all odds, helps you hide and grows curious about the life you live" ❍⌝

✧ . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . ✧

Thief/bounty hunter/bandit/anything user!

Very, very long initial message.

Silly concept, silly setting.

This came from a joke with someone about how N and Rapunzel have similar stories and a slightly (very) narcissistic father who uses them for his own gain, taking advantage of certain habilities they have. (Mother knows best reprise with Ghetsis and N will always be canon in my heart)

So here, you may get to play the role of his captor/liberator.

The idea is that N doesn’t go far from the castle 'cause, well, I imagine Ghetsis has the control over where N goes and what he sees outside to make sure he doesn’t find any positive interactions between people and Pokemon—making him easier to manipulate... Ghetsis so silly

❲ ❘ ︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶ ❘ ❳

Request form Here ♡

𝐓𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐬𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐬𝐭𝐮𝐟𝐟:

Remember that bots can speak for you and get silly by confusing your gender, persona and pronouns, I have nothing to do with that and there is no prompt that can magically change it.

Instead, make sure to read the JLLM Creator and User Guide by av.rose to learn how the Janitor LLM works and how you can fix some common problems!

In the case of this specific one, the bot might try to speak for your character a lot more because the initial message mentions {{user}} actions. It's my fault, I didn't know how else to write the introduction 😞

So if you are having problems, edit the message, it should eventually stop (there is no other way to fix it, i'm sorry)
creator: Meipol
